controlSet.description: Bind a first-person assertion cryptographically to the originating subject
Require supporting evidence references for material first-person claims
Require evaluation against declared acceptance requirements
Require a challenge path for corrections and disputes

rules: Require a bound subject identifier and attestation method
Require at least one supporting or corroborating evidence link for material claims
Require a dispute endpoint for contested assertions

threats.label: Unbound Assertion
threats.description: A first-person claim is presented without trustworthy binding to the originating subject

threats.label: Non-Contestable Acceptance
threats.description: A counterparty accepts or rejects a material assertion without a challenge path

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as an legacy secondary representation.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
